summary.problem: ASR best-of-N v2 (Gate B / G5.1 clean redo) — seed-separated, corpus+macro WER, deployable selector battery
summary.model: qwen3-omni-30b-a3b-instruct Q8_0 GGUF (llama.cpp, -ngl 28; audio EXPERIMENTAL upstream)

oracle.label: ORACLE UPPER BOUND (information-boundary-violating by design: selection uses the reference; NOT deployable)
ORACLE UPPER BOUND (information-boundary-violating by design: selection uses the reference; NOT deployable)

bootstrap.method: hierarchical (resample utterances, then within-utterance resample pool seeds), both with replacement

limitations.single_noise_realization_per_condition: Exactly one additive-noise draw per utterance (NOISE_SEED*100003+utt_idx) is used for the snr5 condition; nested noise replicates (multiple independent noise draws per utterance, forming a third hierarchy level for the bootstrap) are DEFERRED. The hierarchical bootstrap in this artifact resamples utterances and pool-generation seeds only, not noise realizations.

llamacpp_pinned_commit.raw_line: LLAMACPP_COMMIT="${LLAMACPP_COMMIT:-fdbd6abee20e408de21e90ca77a24cd50a6ea073}"  # 2026-06-25, "tests: synchronize contexts at end of test-thread-safety (#24935)"

datasets_lock_entry.name: qwen3-omni-30b-a3b-instruct-gguf
datasets_lock_entry.note: Q8_0 GGUF + bf16 mmproj for llama.cpp -- the W1 genuine best-of-N engine (30B on 24 GB via -ngl 28); file-selective fetch via scripts/data/fetch-qwen3-omni-gguf.sh (whole-repo pull >110 GB deliberately avoided)

provenance.pool_seed_formula: seed = pool_seed*100003 + utt_idx*17 + i  (utt_idx=cohort draw index 0-based, i=candidate index 0-based)
provenance.greedy_seed_note: temperature=0.0 (argmax decode) -> seed has no effect on output; recorded for completeness only

api_gaps.note: llama-server returned non-null logprobs/top_logprobs for every stored hypothesis; logprob-confidence selector is ACTIVE.

summary.verdict: condition=snr5 n=4 (skipped 0); greedy corpus WER 0.020 / macro WER 0.012. Selectors active: ['oracle', 'mbr', 'random', 'length', 'logprob'] at N in {1, 2}. See summary.selectors for per-N per-selector corpus/macro WER + hierarchical-bootstrap deltas vs greedy (2000-rep, utterance-then-pool-seed resampling). Oracle is an information-boundary-violating UPPER BOUND, not a deployable result.
